input.background: Exercise 6.1 and 6.3 considered the random number of TaySachs cases in three pregnancies from a carrier couple $(X \sim b(3,0.25))$.
input.question: What is the expected value of this random variable?

X.description: The random number of Tay-Sachs cases in three pregnancies from a carrier couple, modeled as a binomial random variable.
